# [Product] Rebuild Trends into a multi-visualization intelligence surface

Labels: `area: product-experience`, `type: feature`, `priority: high`, `status: ready`
Milestone: `v0.3 Trends + Team Intelligence`

## Objective

Upgrade Trends so it explains league evolution across seasons with multiple
API-backed visuals.

## Context

Trends should show scoring, discipline, result share, high-scoring match share,
and data coverage across seasons using `/trends/seasons`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Trends reads from `/trends/seasons`.
- [ ] Scoring, discipline, result share, high-scoring match share, and data coverage are visible.
- [ ] Data coverage/caveats are not hidden.
- [ ] Page works on mobile and desktop.
- [ ] Frontend build passes.
